query:
SELECT stationCode, COUNT(*) AS active_target_count, COUNT(DISTINCT categoryId) AS category_count
FROM productivity_target_configs
WHERE active = 1
GROUP BY stationCode
ORDER BY FIELD(stationCode, 'A1', 'A2', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT stationCode, COUNT(*) AS active_target_count, COUNT(DISTINCT categoryId) AS category_count
FROM productivity_target_configs
WHERE active = 1
GROUP BY stationCode
ORDER BY FIELD(stationCode, 'A1', 'A2', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E');
